acquisition method: the spectrometer working in the regime of data-dependent MS to MS/MS switch.
alkylation reagent: alkylated with iodoacetamide (45 min in a dark room at room temperature)
cleavage agent: digested overnight with trypsin (sequencing Grade Modified Trypsin; cat. no. V5111; Promega Corporation)
enrichment method: purification of growth factors using HiTrap heparin affinity columns.
instrument: molecular mass measurements on the Orbitrap Velos mass Spectrometer.
labeling: the material for sequencing was served as 300 mg pellets of enzymatically purified (hyaluronidase, collagenase, DNase and trypsin) calcified cartilage from the costochondral junction of calf ribs.
reduction reagent: reduced with 100 mM 1,4-dithiothreitol (Sigma-Aldrich; Merck KGaA) for 30 min at 56˚C
reduction concentration: reduced with 100 mM 1,4-dithiothreitol (Sigma-Aldrich; Merck KGaA) for 30 min at 56˚C
